title: ADAPTIVE RECREATION - 211info
text: PORTLAND PARKS AND RECREATION ADAPTIVE AND INCLUSIVE RECREATION ADAPTIVE RECREATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers community-based recreation activities and leisure services specially designed for children, teens, and adults with disabilities and/or special needs. 1120 SW 5th Avenue Suite 858 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Children, teens, and adults who have a disability and/or special needs Hours: Office hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Activity hours vary. Email (503) 823-2883 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 823-2883 Main phone (503) 307-4131 Intake Inclusion, ADA Accommodations Requests, and Complaints (503) 284-1867 Alternate Main phone (503) 823-2883 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Search through online guide to find an activity participant would like to register for, then contact a service coordinator. FEES: Varies by service. Scholarships available to City of Portland residents only. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Portland SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions General Recreational Activities/Sports * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Recreation Related Expense Assistance * Disabilities Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - INCLUSION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
